sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 27:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 27:1
items.html: Inner means coarser, meaning having a greater yearning. For this reason, it also draws a greater measure of light, and the level of reflected light that it pushes back is also greater. (Inner Observation, Item 5)
